text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The holidays are here, and at Fine Motion's
suggestion, we're holding a casual party.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Apologies for interrupting your festivities.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Oh! Happy holidays, Tazuna! ♪
choice_data_list: Can we help you with something?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I have something that I'd like Fine Motion to
see...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Oof!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tazuna has brought a cardboard box packed full
of...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
"Petition to allow Fine Motion to continue
racing."

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Are these all... signatures?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I've only brought over a small portion. There's
around another dozen boxes in the office.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: But... why?
choice_data_list: They want to keep watching you run.
They want to keep watching you run.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Of course, the most important thing for us here at
the academy is to respect your situation and your
desires.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
At the same time, we couldn't exactly let all these
voices go unheard.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: ...I understand. Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Now then, I have to organize all those boxes.

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text:
Please wait a moment. ...Would you allow me to
inspect the contents?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After Tazuna leaves, Fine Motion asks me to go
for a short walk with her outside.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: ...I'm so happy.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Ten of thousands of people wish for me to run. I
feel truly honored.
choice_data_list: I'd say this is proof you've made an impact.
I'd say this is proof you've made an impact.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
You're a surprisingly rash individual. We have no
assured method with which to make such an
impact.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I see. I suppose that is a lot of boxes of proof.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
It's not so bad if I can know I'll be in everyone's
hearts.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I do!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
...Although, perhaps I'm putting on a bit of a
front.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: All the same, I'm quite content.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
This collection of everyone's feelings is the
greatest present I could ever receive.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Fine Motion looks truly happy as she smiles.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Brrr... It sure is chilly.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: ...Not just yet.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Let's stay a little longer.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I wouldn't mind if I did.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
That would leave me with no other choice than to
stay here.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
...Just kidding. Let's go back. We were still in the
middle of dinner.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, our peaceful evening draws to a close.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Fine Motion looks truly happy as she smiles.
choice_data_list:
So you won't be needing any other presents,
then?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: No, I do! Have you arranged a gift for me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When I was thinking of what to get for Fine
Motion, one idea immediately jumped out at me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That being...

text_block_list.name: Ramen Shop Owner
text_block_list.text: Welcome! And happy holidays!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Happy holidays.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Happy holidays!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Uhhh... Trainer? What is all this?

text_block_list.name: Ramen Shop Owner
text_block_list.text:
And why is my apprentice so late? Hurry up and
get your butt in the kitchen!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Huh?! What's going on?!

text_block_list.name: Ramen Shop Owner
text_block_list.text:
Not long ago, this fine individual suddenly came
to me with a request for an original ramen recipe.

text_block_list.name: Ramen Shop Owner
text_block_list.text:
I refused at first, but when I heard it was for one
of my favorite regulars, I decided to help out.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's right. I've been training here day after day
whenever I found a spare moment—all for Fine
Motion's sake.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?! How have I never heard of this?!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: It's only natural to keep a present under wraps.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hold on. Have you all been learning?!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Don't be ridiculous. Your trainer simply invited us
here tonight.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
When I heard we'd have the whole place to
ourselves and the food was on the house, there
was no way I was missing it!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: It's a great way to lift our spirits before a race!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Chop... Chop, chop!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Excellent job quartering the seaweed,
Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After many arduous hours of study, I've finally
completed my own ramen recipe!
choice_data_list: One Fine Special coming right up!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Astonishing! The soup is glistening!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Wow, the fish cake is shaped like a four-leaf
clover! How cute. ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, Trainer! This is the most splendid
present ever!
choice_data_list: Eat up before it gets cold!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Right! Let's eat, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Everyone
text_block_list.text: Thanks!
